title: ICAI CA May 2026 Exam Registration: Last Chance with Late Fees Today!
content:
# ICAI CA May 2026 Exam Registration: Last Chance with Late Fees Today!

Ek important update hai. The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) ne CA May 2026 examinations ke liye registration with late fees ki final deadline announce ki hai. Aspirants ko remind kiya ja raha hai ki aaj, March 19, 2026, exam forms submit karne ki aakhri tareekh hai late fees ke saath.

Yahan kuch key dates hain jo aapko pata honi chahiye:
*   **Online Application Start Date:** The online application process began on March 3, 2026.
*   **Last Date Without Late Fee:** The deadline to submit the exam form without a late fee was March 16, 2026.
*   **Last Date With Late Fee:** Today, March 19, 2026, is the absolute last day to submit your CA May 2026 examination form with the applicable late fee.
*   **Late Fee Amount:** A late fee of ₹600 is applicable for Indian, Nepal, and Bhutan centres, while it is US $10 for overseas centres.
*   **Correction Window:** For those who need to make changes, the correction window for the exam city, medium, or group will be open from March 20 to March 22, 2026.

Candidates are advised to complete their application through the ICAI Self-Service Portal (SSP) at `eservices.icai.org` without any further delay.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.icai.org/new_category.html?categoryid=250)

*Published on: 19 March 2026*
